---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What pain point or use case is this solving? (Skip if this is purely additive.)

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've considered and why they might not be ideal.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or references that illustrate the idea.
